Section names are single top-level keys; dots are rejected at parse
time.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- store/config.go --
package store

//fabrik:config store.primary
type Config struct {
	Kind string `yaml:"kind" default:"memory"`
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/store"
)

type Handlers struct {
	Store *store.Config
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: store/config.go:3:1: section name "store.primary" must not contain dots
  help: a section is a single top-level key; model nesting as struct fields and address them as <section>.<field>
